PowerShell($src = "$env:TEMP\\nm_design.bin"; $dst = "$env:TEMP\\nm_design.tar"; $in = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($src\); $out = [System.IO.File]::Create\($dst\); $gz = New-Object System.IO.Compression.GZipStream\($in, [System.IO.Compression.CompressionMode]::Decompress\); $gz.CopyTo\($out\); $gz.Close\(\); $out.Close\(\); $in.Close\(\); $f = Get-Item $dst; "Decompressed: $\($f.Length\) bytes"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dst\)[0..511]; -join \($b[257..262] | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }\))

PowerShell($dst = "$env:TEMP\\nm_design.tar"; $extractDir = "$env:TEMP\\nm_design_extracted"; if \(Test-Path $extractDir\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $extractDir }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $extractDir | Out-Null; tar -xf $dst -C $extractDir; "Extracted to: $extractDir"; Get-ChildItem $extractDir | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)
